customAttributes.description:
COMMEMORATE YOUR ADVENTURES AND CUSTOMIZE YOUR CARDS!
LIMITED
Use any sticker sheet you open. Sticker sheets aren't drafted.
CONSTRUCTED
Bring at least ten unique sticker sheets. No repeat sheets. That's cheats! Before each game begins, choose three at random to use that game.
When told to sticker a card, choose a name or art sticker for free. Ability or power and toughness stickers cost just a few tickets each.
Cards keep their stickers on the battlefield, in the graveyard, and in exile. Even the command zone! If a card goes to your hand or library, its stickers go back to the sheet. Stick them again if you can!
Any ticket costs still apply. Make your cards stronger. Give them festive hats. And more!

[2 TIX] 2: This creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn.
[4 TIX] Whenever a creature enters the battlefield under your control, this permanent deals 2 damage to target player.
[2 TIX] 4/1 (Power and toughness are adjusted to this.)
[3 TIX] 3/6 (Power and toughness are adjusted to this.)
